name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Durham, NC's Superb Cash Advance at 100 E Woodcroft Pkwy offers quick payday and title loans with extended evening hours.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance in Durham, NC is located at 100 E Woodcroft Pkwy, a standalone storefront convenient to the Durham area. The location operates extended hours Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, with weekend hours on Saturday and Sunday from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM. This gives residents throughout Durham flexible access to payday and title loan services.

At this Durham location, Superb Cash Advance provides fast payday loans and title loans for residents needing quick cash. You can reach the 100 E Woodcroft Pkwy branch at 919-372-3115 to discuss loan options, get same-day approval, or ask about typical loan terms and repayment schedules for Durham borrowers.

If you're in Durham and need quick cash between paychecks, visit this Superb Cash Advance location with a valid government ID, proof of income, and an active bank account. The straightforward application process can often result in same-day funding for eligible NC residents.
pros: Same-day cash funding available for approved applicants
No credit check required; accepts all credit types
Extended hours (8:30am-8:30pm weekdays) for working customers
Flexible payment plans customized to individual budgets
Minimal documentation required for quick approval
Physical in-person location for face-to-face service
cons: No published APR or fee schedule on website; cost opacity typical of payday lenders
Single physical location limits accessibility outside Atlanta area
Payday and cash advance loans carry typical industry risks of debt cycles
Customer reviews mention wishes for extended hours, indicating current hours may not suit all schedules
Loan limits ($1,000 for cash advance/payday) may be insufficient for larger emergencies
best_for: Consumers in Atlanta with urgent cash needs (next 24-48 hours) who cannot access traditional bank loans
Self-employed or gig workers without standard income documentation
Individuals with poor or no credit history seeking emergency bridge funding
People who prefer in-person lending with staff guidance over purely online applications
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for Atlanta-area consumers in genuine financial emergencies who need cash within 24 hours and cannot qualify for traditional bank loans. The primary caveat is that payday and cash advance loans are designed for short-term emergencies only; they carry high costs and can create debt cycles if used repeatedly. This is a convenience lender, not a solution to underlying financial problems.
services: Quick approval with no credit check
meta_description: Superb Cash Advance at 100 E Woodcroft Pkwy, Durham, NC – payday & title loans with extended hours.
